title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes: Runs perfectly, if esync is disabled
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes:
Works fine after using the following code in the launch options: 
PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%

Found fix on following thread:
https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/688
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes: Works perfectly at max settings on fullHD with launch option: PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%. Played only skirmish. Played it on OpenSuse leap 15.
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes: Dos'nt really work out of the box, take for ever to start and 1-4 FPS. After "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%" it works perfect, 60 FPS.
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes: Runs perfectly after disabling Esync. I played from the tutorial to the credits (whole singleplayer campaign ~16 hours). There was a single freeze which forced me to kill the game process and load an old save. Apart from that, runs like native. Did not test multiplayer.
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes: Version upgrade fixed the few artefacts it had. Still have to disable ESYNC for it to work well.
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes: Seems to all run fine after the Disable Esync.  Haven't had any problems so far.
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes:
I made an initial attempt without esync which failed, after esync. game runs slightly better then windows. that could be the change from the gtx1050 normally in it. took longer for sim lag to be a problem. although i did crash, i think that is from the simlag getting too extreme, as it does on windows (10).
I could not test sound, as fedora is being iffy about hdmi output... I also had NO config hassles. ran it with max fidelity and bloom @ 1080p res
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance

notes:
The game loads up after disabling ESYNC. It performs pretty well, I played some skirmishes for a few hours, but came across a persistent issue.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
When in 4v4 skirmish, with settings on medium the game would freeze and I would have to kill the process. After loading that save, the game would play for a minute or so and it would happen again. This issue cropped up at around 500 units with the unit cap at 1000.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
I reloaded the save after changing the video setting to the 'Low' preset and I didn't have any issues after that. This happened on 3 separate occasions with me applying the same fix.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This never happened when I played this game on Windows.
title: Supreme Commander: Forged Alliance
